common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define:
Dispute return.

Support to raise dispute when return_status in REQUESTED / PROCESSING/ACCEPTED

request_params.description:
The dispute reason id.

Please call v2.returns.get_return_dispute_reason to get it.
request_params.name: dispute_reason_id

request_params.description: Determines whether image submission is mandatory for the dispute request - mandatory input field for all dispute reasons except "Did not receive the return product".
request_params.name: image_list

children.description: The module_index of current evidence module returned by get_return_dispute_reason API.
children.name: module_index

children.description: The requirement content of current evidence module returned by get_return_dispute_reason API.
children.name: requirement
children.sample: Photo(s) or Video of unboxing the returned parcel with the consignment note (Airway Bill).

children.description: The image URLs of current evidence module. It is recommended to pass in the URL returned by convert_image API.
children.name: image_url

request_params.name: dispute_text_reason
request_params.sample: Received return item(s), buyer's claim incorrect

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

image_list.requirement: Photo(s) or Video of unboxing the returned parcel with the consignment note (Airway Bill).
Photo(s) or Video of all returned item(s)
Photo(s) or Video while packing the parcel with the consignment note (Airway Bill).
Photo or Video  of the product that is follow the details in description.

value.dispute_text_reason: Received return item(s), buyer's claim incorrect

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/returns/dispute?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "dispute_reason_id": 50,
    "dispute_text_reason": "Received return item(s), buyer\\'s claim incorrect",
    "email": "test@example.com",
    "image_list": [
        {
            "image_url": [
                "https://fileproxy.scsusercontent.com/api/v2/files/c2hvcGVlLWRyYzAx/bf10d801_e9c9e5473d3345d08671a8cc3bc1a6de.jpg",
                "https://fileproxy.scsusercontent.com/api/v2/files/c2hvcGVlLWRyYzAx/bf10d801_1733e9f051994b56ae748d4ebd40d0ee.jpg"
            ],
            "module_index": 1,
            "requirement": "Photo(s) or Video of unboxing the returned parcel with the consignment note (Airway Bill)."
        }
    ],
    "return_sn": "24112301K66SQXM"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: sunset the request filed "dispute_reason", please follow the new flow to raise dispute, may refer https://open.shopee.cn/announcements/883
